global_description: Rectangular input device with a grid of keys, predominantly black or white, made of plastic. The surface is flat with raised keys, each with a printed character or symbol. Some models include a numeric keypad on the right side.

part_details.keys: Raised, square or rectangular, with printed characters
part_details.numeric keypad: Additional set of keys on the right side
part_details.function keys: Row of keys at the top
part_details.space bar: Long key at the bottom center

spatial_relations: Keys arranged in a grid on the body
Numeric keypad on the right side
Space bar at the bottom center
